creator: thompsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Sep 18, 2008 at 12:05:31AM +0200, Nick Hibma wrote:
> It gets annoying after a while to have to search for the correct driver for
> your serial device. There is simply too many of them. It would be simpler to
> have to load usbser, ucom and usb and be done with it.

This is true and the new usb stack bundles them all in usb2_serial. Im
not sure there is much point changing the existing usb stack as its
tagged for replacement (assuming usb4bsd goes well).


Andrew
